org.docgene.model

Interface ParagraphElementParent

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    org.docgene.model.AbstractParagraph, org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLAPIDoc, XMLAPIDoc, XMLAPIDocElement, XMLBasicNote, XMLBlock, XMLBlockquote, XMLBox, XMLChapter, XMLCode, XMLDiv, XMLIfCondition, XMLIncludedAPI, XMLIncludedAPIArgument, XMLIncludedAPIMember, XMLInfobox, XMLInfobox.BaseProperty, XMLList, XMLListItem, XMLMessageBox, XMLParagraph, XMLPre, XMLTable, XMLTableCell, XMLTableColumn, XMLTerm, XMLTextStyle, XMLTree, XMLTreeItem

    public interface ParagraphElementParent
    Represent a parent which can contain Paragraph Elements.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addElement(ParagraphElement element)
      Add an element.
      default int countElements()
      Count the number of children elements.
      default ParagraphElement getElement(int index)
      Return the nth of child element.
      java.util.List<ParagraphElement> getElements()
      Return the list of children elements.
      default ParagraphElement getFirstElement()
      Return the first element of null if there are no children elements.
      default ParagraphElement getLastElement()
      Return the last element of null if there are no children elements.
      default boolean hasElements()
      Return true if there are children elements.
      default boolean isEmpty()
      Return true if the paragraph is empty.
      void setElements(java.util.List<ParagraphElement> elements)
      Set the list of elements.

    • Method Detail

      • addElement

        void addElement(ParagraphElement element)
        Add an element.
        Parameters:
        element - the element

      • getElements

        Return the list of children elements.

        the list of children elements

      • hasElements

        default boolean hasElements()
        Return true if there are children elements.
        Returns:
        true if there are children element

      • getElement

        default ParagraphElement getElement(int index)
        Return the nth of child element. Return null if there is none.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        Returns:
        the nth of child element

      • countElements

        default int countElements()
        Count the number of children elements.
        Returns:
        the number of children elements

      • setElements

        void setElements(java.util.List<ParagraphElement> elements)
        Set the list of elements.
        Parameters:
        elements - the list of elements

      • isEmpty

        default boolean isEmpty()
        Return true if the paragraph is empty.
        Returns:
        true if the paragraph is empty

      • getFirstElement

        default ParagraphElement getFirstElement()
        Return the first element of null if there are no children elements.
        Returns:
        the first element of null if there are no children elements

      • getLastElement

        default ParagraphElement getLastElement()
        Return the last element of null if there are no children elements.
        Returns:
        the last element of null if there are no children elements
